summary.description: Concise description of the ingestion batch outcome.

evidence.description: Key quality and risk findings from ingest processing.

riskLevel.description: Risk level based on sensitivity and quality issues: low, medium, or high.

anomalies.description: Specific quality issues found (truncated content, missing fields, unparseable data).

keyFacts.description: Extracted entities for metadata linking (compound codes, phases, endpoints, regions, dataset IDs).

flags.description: Sensitivity and compliance markers (PHI detected, PII present, confidential data).
